field_descriptions.batch_id: Unique identifier for one telemetry upload batch sent from the extension to the backend.
field_descriptions.session_id: Unique identifier for the study session that all events in the batch belong to.
field_descriptions.user_id: Application-level user identifier attached to the session and copied into events when available.
field_descriptions.source: Telemetry source identifier. For the current collector this is always chrome_extension.
field_descriptions.extension_version: Version of the Chrome extension that created the batch or event.
field_descriptions.sent_at: UTC timestamp when the extension sent the batch to the backend.
field_descriptions.sequence_number: Monotonic client-side batch counter used for debugging upload order.
field_descriptions.events: Array of closed browser interval records collected during the session.
field_descriptions.event_id: Unique identifier for one raw interval event. Used by the backend for deduplication.
field_descriptions.event_type: Type of raw telemetry event. Currently browser_interval.
field_descriptions.client_created_at: UTC timestamp when the interval record was created by the extension.
field_descriptions.interval_start: UTC timestamp when the tracked browser interval started.
field_descriptions.interval_end: UTC timestamp when the tracked browser interval ended.
field_descriptions.duration_ms: Length of the closed interval in milliseconds.
field_descriptions.tab_id: Chrome tab identifier for the active tab during the interval.
field_descriptions.window_id: Chrome window identifier for the browser window that owned the active tab.
field_descriptions.tab_url: Full URL of the active tab during the interval.
field_descriptions.tab_domain: Domain parsed from the active tab URL before backend normalization.
field_descriptions.tab_title: Tab title observed during the interval.
field_descriptions.is_browser_focused: Whether the browser window was focused during the interval.
field_descriptions.is_tab_active: Whether the tab was the active selected tab during the interval.
field_descriptions.page_visible: Whether the page was visible according to the document visibility API when content-script data was reported.
field_descriptions.scroll_count: Number of scroll events observed by the content script during the interval.
field_descriptions.click_count: Number of click events observed by the content script during the interval.
field_descriptions.keystroke_count: Number of keydown events observed by the content script during the interval.
field_descriptions.transition_in_reason: Reason the interval started, such as session_started, tab_activated, navigation_completed, window_focused, click_activity, keystroke_activity, scroll_activity, page_hidden, or page_visible.
field_descriptions.transition_out_reason: Reason the interval ended, such as tab_deactivated, navigation_completed, window_blurred, session_stopped, click_activity, keystroke_activity, scroll_activity, page_hidden, or page_unload.
field_descriptions.segment_index: Sequential index of the segment within the current session timeline as tracked by the extension.
field_descriptions.is_partial_segment: Whether the interval ended early because the session stopped or a forced partial flush occurred.
field_descriptions.collector_id: Identifier for the telemetry collector implementation.

events.tab_title: Reddit - The heart of the internet
Reddit - The heart of the internet
